opening_positioning: Technical project manager with deep software, application, and enterprise delivery experience who can bring structured execution, technical-team fluency, and regulated-environment discipline to healthcare software delivery.
question_prompts_to_ask_them: What does success look like in the first 90 days for this role?
How are development, business, and partner priorities balanced when delivery pressure increases?
Which parts of the delivery model are most affected by compliance or security-clearance requirements?
Where does this role need the most immediate improvement: execution rhythm, reporting, stakeholder alignment, or process discipline?

notes: This is a role-specific starter and intentionally avoids runtime timestamps.
External live-capture systems may append timestamps without changing the baseline starter file.
Priority story order now includes canonical story resolution for live retrieval systems.

build_log.action: Selected opening position, story order, and response controls from the role-specific opportunity profile.
Added live-note structure, interviewer questions, and operational-fit flags for interview use.
Resolved live interview priority story aliases to canonical master-story IDs.
